title: Thirukkadigai
tagline: Thirukkadigai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirukkadigai or Sholingapuram is a temple in Sholinghur, a village in Ranipet district of the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu.
overview.description: Thirukkadigai or Sholingapuram is a temple in Sholinghur, a village in Ranipet district of the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is mentioned in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Lakshmi Narasimhar, and his consort Lakshmi as Thirumamagal. There are three separate shrines in the form of Narasimha, Bhaktavatsala Perumal and Hanuman (Anjaneya). T

topPlaces.name: Vallimalai Jain caves
topPlaces.description: Vallimalai Jain caves are located in Vallimalai village in Katpadi taluk of Vellore district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vallimalai
topPlaces.description: Vallimalai is a village in Katpadi taluk ( Vellore North Taluk ) of Vellore district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Vellore City and it is near Ponnai.

topPlaces.name: Melpadi
topPlaces.description: Melpadi is an ancient small town in Vellore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is on the western bank of Ponnai near the Palar River.

topPlaces.name: Ponnai
topPlaces.description: Ponnai is a Town panchayat which is located in the Vellore District within the state of Tamil Nadu. Ponnai Panchayat is composed of 18 villages, with Ponnai serving as the head town.

topPlaces.name: Nangamangalam
topPlaces.description: Nangamangalam is a village in the Chittoor district of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Kandipedu
topPlaces.description: Kandipedu (pronounced [kanːdːpedu]) is a village in Katpadi, at the northern part of Vellore city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It sits on the Katpadi-Vallimalai railway line, near Thiruvalluvar University, one of India's premier educational institutions.

topPlaces.name: Vilwanatheswarar temple
topPlaces.description: Vilwanatheswarar Temple (also spelled Bilvanathesvara) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvalam, a village in Vellore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Vilwanatheswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

items.note: Vallimalai Jain caves are located in Vallimalai village in Katpadi taluk of Vellore district, Tamil Nadu.
Vallimalai is a village in Katpadi taluk ( Vellore North Taluk ) of Vellore district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Vellore City and it is near Ponnai.
Melpadi is an ancient small town in Vellore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is on the western bank of Ponnai near the Palar River.
Ponnai is a Town panchayat which is located in the Vellore District within the state of Tamil Nadu. Ponnai Panchayat is composed of 18 villages, with Ponnai serving as the head town.
Nangamangalam is a village in the Chittoor district of Andhra Pradesh in India.

Kandipedu (pronounced [kanːdːpedu]) is a village in Katpadi, at the northern part of Vellore city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It sits on the Katpadi-Vallimalai railway line, near Thiruvalluvar University, one of India's premier educational institutions.

Vilwanatheswarar Temple (also spelled Bilvanathesvara) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvalam, a village in Vellore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Vilwanatheswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirukkadigai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirukkadigai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirukkadigai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirukkadigai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirukkadigai?
faq.a: Stays in Thirukkadigai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirukkadigai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vallimalai Jain caves, Vallimalai, Melpadi, Ponnai, Nangamangalam.
